problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: Combining Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
